semantic_text: Simplify room-chatbot-data API to debug direct access issue

Add enhanced error handling and debugging for DeepSeek 406 errors

- Added detailed logging for OpenRouter requests
- Added specific handling for 406 Not Acceptable errors
- Added DeepSeek-specific token limit adjustment (max 4096)
- Added request header logging for debugging
- Improved error messages for users when models are unavailable

Fix memory system duplicate saves and message counting

- Added sessionSavedRef flag to prevent duplicate memory saves
- Fixed message counting to only count unique user messages
- Added server-side duplicate prevention (checks within 15 min window)
- Improved activity tracking to only reset on user messages
- Session now saves exactly once after 10 minutes of inactivity
- Accurate message totals in learning profiles

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix navbar concerns badge to show only pending concerns count

- Replace hardcoded concernsCount=3 with dynamic fetch from database
- Now only shows count of pending flagged_messages, not all concerns
- Badge will update in real-time and accurately reflect actual pending concerns

Add polite but firm educational responses for inappropriate content

- Modified safety monitoring to provide educational guidance for sexual content
- Updated LLM system prompt with clear guidelines for handling inappropriate topics
- Ensures students receive appropriate redirection to parents/counselors/health classes
- Maintains supportive tone while establishing clear boundaries for educational chatbots

- Fixed getQueueHealth method in health check endpoint
- Removed NODE_ENV assignment to satisfy TypeScript readonly constraint
- Build now completes successfully

Reinstate student room join feature with join code

- Add /join-room and /room-join/* as public routes in middleware
- Add /student-access and /pin-login to public routes
- Fix student profile page imports (PageStructure components)
- Remove unsupported icon and loading props from ModernButton usage

Students can now join classes directly from the homepage using just a room code.

Fix video system separation, resolve 406 errors, and create missing routes

- Fixed video system to properly separate free courses (YouTube/Vimeo) from premium courses (self-hosted)
- Resolved 406 PGRST116 errors by changing .single() to .maybeSingle() in student profile queries
- Added proper video platform detection and conditional rendering
- Created missing routes: /help, /safety, /contact to fix 404 errors
- Re-enabled Courses navigation link in teacher dashboard
- Added defensive programming for video server URL handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix chatbot access for students joining with room codes

- Add user verification in auth system for room-chatbot-data endpoint
- Check if user exists in Supabase auth before processing
- Use admin client to bypass RLS for direct access students
- Add detailed logging for debugging
- Match the fix pattern already applied to room-chatbots endpoint

This resolves 401/404 errors when students access chatbots after joining with only a room code.

Add courses display to room details page

- Updated room-details API to fetch and include assigned courses
- Added courses section to room details page showing assigned courses with subject badges
- Fixed TypeScript interfaces to include courses in RoomDetailsData
- Courses now display alongside chatbots in room configuration

Fix styled-components hydration issues and complete courses functionality

- Fixed hydration mismatches by loading Header component with ssr: false
- Resolved missing cookie.js error with clean dependency reinstall
- Added course navigation and display functionality to student rooms
- Updated StyledComponentsRegistry for better SSR handling
- Courses now properly appear and link in student dashboards and rooms

Add CSV download for student lists

- Add Download CSV button to StudentList component
- Add Download CSV button to Students Overview page
- CSV includes student names, usernames, PIN codes, emails, and other relevant data
- Fetches PIN codes automatically when not already loaded
- Generates contextual filenames with room ID/filter and date
- Shows loading state during download on overview page
- Handles CSV escaping for special characters

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix safety message duplication in student chat

- Added 5-minute time window filter for safety messages
- Safety messages older than 5 minutes are filtered out on initial load
- fetchSafetyMessages now accepts specific message ID from broadcasts
- Prevents old safety/monitoring messages from reappearing in new chats
- Improved logging to track message age and filtering decisions

Fix overly restrictive AI moderation and increase system prompt limit

- Made jailbreak patterns more specific, requiring explicit malicious intent
- Expanded educational whitelist to include common learning phrases like "step by step"
- Academic cheating detection now only catches blatant complete cheating requests
- Keep sexual content filters strict for student safety
- Increased system prompt character limit from 4000 to 8000 for teacher flexibility

This prevents legitimate educational requests like "take me step by step through how to answer a question" from being incorrectly flagged as jailbreak attempts.

Fix model selection and add safety concerns to student overview

Changes:
1. Fixed DeepSeek model selection issue:
   - Added missing DeepSeek-R1 option to edit page dropdown
   - Fixed wrong default model in create mode (was qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b)
   - Added debug logging to track model selection

2. Completed safety concerns display in student overview:
   - Added safety concerns to mobile view
   - Added total pending concerns stat card
   - Shows pending/resolved concern counts per student
   - Fixed enable_rag logic for reading_room and viewing_room bot types

3. Removed temporary SQL files from project root

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix assessment storage by removing user_id filter in message query

The assessment process was failing because:
- The query was filtering messages by user_id = student_id
- But assistant messages also have the student's user_id in this system
- This caused the assessment to receive an incorrect set of messages
- Removed the user_id filter to get all messages with the correct chatbot_id

Also includes enhanced debugging for chatbot and student profile verification.

- Helps diagnose issues with assessment bots not using their rubric
